privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for bcwebcam_env trim_supplier_prefix_from_barcode task by discovering that the task is entirely defective. Critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1, verifier.py) are completely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable. The expected output path (C:\workspace\data\trimmed_output.txt), expected raw barcode (FAC-889012345K), expected trimmed barcode (889012345K), and trim amount (4) explicitly match the prompt description, but there is no programmatic logic to evaluate them.
